_comment: neoclaw default topology — pair-programmer ReAct loop.
This is the JSON equivalent of NeoGraph's create_react_graph(...) and
of neoclaw v0.4's hardcoded Agent path. The same model + same tool
set behave the same way under either; this file is what you copy and
edit when you want a *different* persona without rebuilding.
Wiring: __start__ → llm → has_tool_calls? tools : __end__   tools → llm
(the Reasoning + Acting loop from Yao et al. 2022, arXiv:2210.03629)
name: pair_react
